reviews.comment:
Pésima atención, me patoteo el empleado y encima no me cargo los puntos de serviclub ni me hizo el descuento de los domingos... Una vergüenza!!

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service. The employee bullied me and on top of that, he didn't charge my Serviclub points or give me the Sunday discount... Shameful!!

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención, en verano se complica cargar combustible, se complica mantener un orden una vez que la fila sobrepasa la primer cuadra, en general un lugar limpio, ordenado y buena atención.

(Translated by Google)
Very good service. In the summer, it's difficult to fill up with gas, and it's hard to maintain order once the line extends past the first block. Overall, the place is clean, tidy, and the service is good.

reviews.comment:
Buena atención. Lo único es que en temporada no hay muchas estaciones de servicio y está siempre llena.

(Translated by Google)
Good service. The only downside is that during peak season there aren't many gas stations and it's always crowded.
